title: Item View/ Item Card disappeared?

posts.author: Ratchet (Gautier Rigal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
So today i was checking on my item, and what a surprise when i saw that i could not add any new view to my items, and worst, that item card seems to have totally disappeared !
I wonder if i am the only one with this problem, because it’s pretty huge complication for my company

posts.author: iHUSAlex (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here, cannot see the Item Card view, stating that it’s been disabled by the developer. This view is a key part of our workflow. What is happening?

posts.author: iHUSAlex (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml: It also seems that the “Add view” button no longer appears when opening up a pulse.

posts.author: Ratchet (Gautier Rigal)
posts.cookedHtml: Contacted the support for more infos, kinda reassuring to know i’m not the only one having this problem

posts.author: Ratchet (Gautier Rigal)
posts.cookedHtml: Apparently, it’s a known issue and they are working to fix it

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
